title: Parameterized identifiers not parsed in CREATE TABLE … AS <table>
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
`CREATE TABLE … AS <table_identifier>` fails to parse when the database part is passed via query parameter `{db:Identifier}`. Same failure with/without an ENGINE clause. Other uses of `{…:Identifier}` parse fine (e.g., in the target table name, or when using AS SELECT …). Looks like the grammar for `CREATE TABLE … AS <TableIdentifier>` doesn’t accept parameterized identifiers.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
ClickHouse client version 25.7.4.11 (official build).
```
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db:Identifier}.test (a UInt64) ENGINE = Log;
-- this does not work and it should
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS  {db:Identifier}.test_log
ENGINE = Log
AS {db:Identifier}.test;
Code: 62. DB::Exception: Syntax error: failed at position 106 ({) (line 4, col 4): {db:Identifier}.test;
. Expected one of: SELECT query, possibly with UNION, list of union elements, SELECT query, subquery, possibly with UNION, SELECT subquery, SELECT query, WITH, FROM, SELECT, identifier. (SYNTAX_ERROR)
-- same here
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db:Identifier}.test_log
AS {db:Identifier}.test
ENGINE = Log;
➜  tmp cat test.sql| clickhouse-client -nm --param_db='default'
Code: 62. DB::Exception: Syntax error: failed at position 112 (ENGINE) (line 4, col 1): ENGINE = Log;
. Expected one of: ParserArrayOfJSONIdentifierDelimiter, token sequence, OpeningSquareBracket, Dot, token, OpeningRoundBracket. (SYNTAX_ERROR)
-- and here
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db:Identifier}.test_log
AS {db:Identifier}.test;
Code: 62. DB::Exception: Syntax error: failed at position 111 (end of query) (line 3, col 23): ;
. Expected one of: ParserArrayOfJSONIdentifierDelimiter, token sequence, OpeningSquareBracket, Dot, token, OpeningRoundBracket. (SYNTAX_ERROR)
cat test.sql | clickhouse-client -nm --param_db='default'
```
### Expected behavior
Above SQL commands should work as expected using query parameters.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
### Additional context
_No response_
poc: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db:Identifier}.test (a UInt64) ENGINE = Log;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db:Identifier}.test_log
AS {db:Identifier}.test;
key_bug_features: Parameterized identifiers not accepted in CREATE TABLE statements
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db:Identifier}.users (id UInt64, name String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db:Identifier}.user_logs (user_id UInt64, log_message String, log_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY log_time;
INSERT INTO {db:Identifier}.user_logs SELECT id, 'User logged in' AS log_message, now() FROM {db:Identifier}.users WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db:Identifier}.user_summary AS SELECT user_id, count(*) AS log_count FROM {db:Identifier}.user_logs GROUP BY user_id;
